text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: It's the 24th of December, and today...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Happy holidays!

text_block_list.name: Chiyono O and Yaeno
text_block_list.text: Happy holidays!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Ardan and I are hosting a party in my
office, and she's invited a bunch of her friends to
join us.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! It was so much fun preparing for the party
with everyone! I felt a bit like I was back at home!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
While I am unaccustomed to celebrations such as
these... it has brought me great joy to break
bread with all of you.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
I, too, am delighted that we've all been able to
enjoy this party together.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Perhaps... that's because of all of the moments
we've spent together in the past.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Ardan...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
I see today as something of an end-of-year party
as well, so I think it might be fun to talk about the
paths each of us have traveled thus far.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: It's been such an eventful year! But you know, one memory that'll definitely stay with me is that time at the Takarazuka Kinen, when...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Sitting around a table full of food, Mejiro Ardan
and her friends reminisce for hours.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Then, when the sun sets...

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Are you certain? Leaving you and your trainer
with all the cleaning duties does not sit well with
me...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Yes, I'm quite certain. I am the host, so please think nothing of it.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Well, I guess Yaeno and I'll be on our way! Thanks
so much, Ardan!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Come on, Yaeno! You and I are going to have a
little after-party! Tonight, you're with me!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Huh? Oh, um, very well.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: ...Good luck, Ardan!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Hehe. Thank you, Chiyono O.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Thank you for such an enjoyable day. If we have
the opportunity to throw a similar party next
year... I wish to do this again.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: For sure! Next year, and the year after that, too!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
I will be there when the time comes, even if I have
to make my way back from the ends of the earth.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: ...I'm grateful.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After seeing off Sakura Chiyono O and Yaeno
Muteki...
choice_data_list: Okay, ready to start cleaning up?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Yes, but following that...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Shall we follow their example?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Let's have an after-party! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Once my office is spick and span, Mejiro Ardan
changes her outfit and the two of us go for an
evening stroll through town.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Yes. I wished to see the holiday splendor in town
with my own eyes.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
After all, I've spent so much time cooped up in
the manor that I've had very few opportunities to
see towns illuminated like this.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
...Hehe. I'll admit, I also wanted to experience
what an after-party is like.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
I'm over the moon that I've been able to do both
with you, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
...The thought that this scenery can be only
glimpsed at this time of year makes it so
incredibly precious.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
I feel as though... we're walking amongst a sea of
stars.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Ardan smiles as she speaks, and an idea
comes to me.
choice_data_list:
Why don't we go and see an even bigger sea of
stars?

Why don't we go and see an even bigger sea of
stars?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After making our way through the bustling night
streets, Mejiro Ardan and I eventually arrive at
the planetarium.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Oh, I had no idea there was a planetarium here.
choice_data_list: I'm glad there are still some seats left.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! It's been absolutely ages since I last visited
a planetarium. I'm quite excited.

text_block_list.name: Announcer
text_block_list.text:
Welcome to your guided tour of the cosmos. This
evening, we'll be journeying through the stars
that illuminate this holy night.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Wow!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: It's all so beautiful...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
This doesn't even come close to paying Mejiro
Ardan back for everything she's done for me. In
fact...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Seeing the stars twinkle in her eyes, and hearing the excitement in her gasps, I feel like she's given me another gift.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Hehe! I got lost in the moment there.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Thank you for such a wonderful time, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: ...Someday.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
I'd like to gaze upon real stars with you, just like
this.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Yes! I shall!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With Mejiro Ardan and I making a promise for the
future, tonight has become an evening I'll never
forget.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, our after-party comes to an end, and I
see Mejiro Ardan back to her dorm.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Thank you for today, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
For the party, the after-party... and for inviting
me to see a wondrous sea of stars.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Thanks to you... it's been an evening I shall never
forget.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
...The twinkling specks above us are all light from
distant stars, far far away—moments shining down
from the past.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Some of those lights... may even be the last
remnants of stars that no longer exist.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: And yet...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: In this moment, we're here, looking up at them.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
And the words we weave now will go on, beyond
this moment and far into the future, as memories.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: ...Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: In your eyes, is the person I am today...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: A star?
choice_data_list: You're the most beautiful star I've seen tonight.
You're the most beautiful star I've seen tonight.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
My mind reconjures the image of her in the
planetarium, starlight reflected in her eyes... I
doubt I'll ever forget the pure, radiant wonder I
saw in her today.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: I feel the same...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
All day today, I've felt the breath of a star close
by... I shall keep that breath safe within my heart.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: For as long as I draw breath myself.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Someday, I'll look back on the sparkling of the
stars I saw tonight.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The night proves so unforgettable that I've got no
doubt in my mind about that.
